panels.title: Line: rock_count vs frequency
panels.sql:
SELECT 
  rock_count,
  COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM (
  SELECT cluster_id, COUNT(*) AS rock_count
  FROM scans
  GROUP BY cluster_id
)
GROUP BY rock_count
ORDER BY rock_count

panels.title: Bar: quality_bin vs material_count
panels.sql:
SELECT 
  CAST(FLOOR(c.quality / 50) * 50 AS INT) AS quality_bin,
  COUNT(*) AS material_count
FROM compositions c
WHERE type NOT IN ('inert_materials','none','Inert Materials')
GROUP BY CAST(FLOOR(c.quality / 50) * 50 AS INT)
ORDER BY quality_bin

panels.title: Bar: quality_bin vs total_volume
panels.sql:
SELECT 
  CAST(FLOOR(c.quality / 50) * 50 AS INT) AS quality_bin,
  SUM(s.volume * c.amount / 100) AS total_volume
FROM scans s
JOIN compositions c ON s.capture_id = c.capture_id
WHERE type NOT IN ('inert_materials','none','Inert Materials')
GROUP BY CAST(FLOOR(c.quality / 50) * 50 AS INT)
ORDER BY quality_bin

panels.title: Bar: gravity_well vs scan_count
panels.sql:
SELECT 
  system,
  gravity_well,
  COUNT(*) AS scan_count
FROM scans
GROUP BY system, gravity_well
ORDER BY scan_count DESC
